name: combat
checklist: Spawn at the military compound facing inland, full vitals.
Equip the pistol (Makarov) and fire — a 9mm round is consumed, hitscan at ~90 m.
Equip the rifle (Mosin) and fire — a 7.62 round is consumed, long-range hitscan.
Equip the shotgun (Izh-43) and fire — 6 pellets in a cone, one shell consumed.
Take damage from a zombie, then apply a bandage — hp climbs back.
Confirm firing with an empty ammo type produces the out-of-ammo notice, no crash.
